Interface INetworkDiagram

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control the network diagram content.

[Guid("75BB2954-2EAB-4AA3-A783-35366376494D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface INetworkDiagram

QueryFeaturesByObjectIDs(bool, bool, bool, long[], long[], long[], out IEnumNetworkDiagramJunction, out IEnumNetworkDiagramEdge, out IEnumNetworkDiagramContainer)

Returns the set of network diagram features corresponding to the specified object IDs.

void QueryFeaturesByObjectIDs(bool addContents, bool addConnected, bool returnGeometry, long[] jctOids, long[] ctnrOids, long[] edgeOids, out IEnumNetworkDiagramJunction junctions, out IEnumNetworkDiagramEdge Edges, out IEnumNetworkDiagramContainer Containers)

addContents bool
addConnected bool
returnGeometry bool
jctOids long[]
ctnrOids long[]
edgeOids long[]
junctions IEnumNetworkDiagramJunction
Edges IEnumNetworkDiagramEdge
Containers IEnumNetworkDiagramContainer
